obligations.rule: Default behavior: validate standard email formats.
obligations.why: Baseline functionality as described in the README.

obligations.rule: Allow display name format when `allow_display_name` is true.
Require display name format when `require_display_name` is true.
Reject non-English UTF8 characters in local part when `allow_utf8_local_part` is false.
Allow email addresses without TLD when `require_tld` is false.
Allow IP addresses in the domain part when `allow_ip_domain` is true.
Reject emails exceeding standard max length unless `ignore_max_length` is true.
Reject emails containing blacklisted characters in the local part.
Reject emails with domains matching host_blacklist.
Reject emails with domains not matching host_whitelist.

test_groups.title: Default email validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers baseline functionality for validating standard email formats.

test_groups.title: Allow display name format
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_display_name` option to validate emails with display names.

test_groups.title: Require display name format
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `require_display_name` option to enforce display name format.

test_groups.title: Reject UTF8 in local part
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_utf8_local_part` option to reject non-English UTF8 characters in the local part.

test_groups.title: Allow emails without TLD
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `require_tld` option to allow emails without a top-level domain.

test_groups.title: Allow IP addresses in domain
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `allow_ip_domain` option to validate emails with IP addresses in the domain part.

test_groups.title: Ignore max length restriction
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `ignore_max_length` option to allow emails exceeding standard max length.

test_groups.title: Reject blacklisted characters
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `blacklisted_chars` option to reject emails containing blacklisted characters in the local part.

test_groups.title: Reject blacklisted domains
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `host_blacklist` option to reject emails with domains matching the blacklist.

test_groups.title: Allow only whitelisted domains
test_groups.rationale: Tests the `host_whitelist` option to reject emails with domains not matching the whitelist.
